name: GIGABYTE Z890 AORUS XTREME AI TOP E-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - Supports DDR5-9500(OC) - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - 4x M.2 Slots - Dual Thunderbolt 5 Type-C with DP-Alt - Dual 10GbE LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4
shortName: GIGABYTE Z890 AORUS XTREME AI TOP E-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851
description: E-ATX enthusiast LGA 1851 motherboard with dual PCIe 5.0, DDR5-9500, dual Thunderbolt 5, and Wi-Fi 7.
